description_long: This object is a small, plush stuffed toy resembling a long-haired cat, with a fluffy, textured exterior that mimics the appearance of fur. The body is compact and rounded, with a bushy tail visible from the rear and side views. The fur is predominantly a very light, almost white color, giving the toy a soft and gentle appearance. The face is somewhat obscured by the long fur, but rounded ears and subtle facial features can be discerned. The toy sits in a relaxed, upright posture, with its tail curled to one side. Its overall size and construction suggest it is lightweight and designed for cuddling or decorative purposes.
description: A small, plush stuffed toy resembling a long-haired, light-colored cat with a fluffy texture and a bushy tail. The toy sits upright and has a soft, gentle appearance.
description_view_0: The toy is seen from a slight angle, showing the side of the head and part of the body, with the long fur partially obscuring facial features.
description_view_1: The rear view highlights the bushy tail and the full, fluffy back of the toy, with the head and ears visible above the body.
description_view_2: The front view reveals the rounded face, subtle facial features, and the plush, voluminous fur covering the chest and body.
description_view_3: This view shows the toy from the opposite side, with the tail curled outward and the plush limbs partially visible beneath the fur.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with subtle, soft features partially hidden by long fur. The eyes and mouth are not prominently visible, giving a calm and gentle appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with the tail curled to one side and limbs tucked beneath the body, the head is slightly raised.
